description_long: This object consists of five discarded soda cans, each with a cylindrical aluminum body and a slightly domed top and bottom. The cans display a variety of bright colors, including orange, green, and purple, with some featuring visible branding and product labels. The tops of the cans have standard pull tabs, and the sides are adorned with printed graphics, including the word 'ZUKS' and the word 'SODA' on at least one can. The surfaces appear smooth and metallic, with a glossy finish that reflects light. No visible dents, rust, or damage marks are present, and the cans are empty, as indicated by their discarded state. The group of cans is arranged in a scattered manner, typical of litter found in urban environments.
description: A group of five empty, brightly colored soda cans with smooth, glossy metallic surfaces and visible branding, scattered as street trash.
description_view_0: This view shows the tops and sides of all five cans, highlighting the orange, green, and purple colors, as well as the 'ZUKS SODA' branding on the central can.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the rear and side labels of the cans, with the orange and green cans most prominent and the purple can partially visible.
description_view_2: The bottoms and sides of the cans are visible here, with the orange can upright and the purple and green cans lying on their sides.
description_view_3: This view displays the tops and sides of the cans, with the pull tabs and the 'ZUKS' branding on the orange can clearly visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The cans feature a bold, white 'ZUKS' brand name in uppercase letters on the label, with a small black-and-white hexagonal emblem nearby.
